subject: CORS blocking test.tangotiempo.com - need origin added
body:
Hey Fulton,

test.tangotiempo.com is being blocked by CORS on calendarbeaf-prod:

```
curl -X OPTIONS 'https://calendarbeaf-prod.azurewebsites.net/api/events' \
  -H 'Origin: https://test.tangotiempo.com'

HTTP/1.1 400 The origin 'https://test.tangotiempo.com' is not allowed.
```

Production (tangotiempo.com) works fine - returns 200 with proper CORS headers.

Can you add these origins to Azure CORS settings?
- https://test.tangotiempo.com
- http://localhost:3001 (for local dev)

This is blocking all TEST environment testing for TIEMPO-388.

Thanks!
- Sarah
